title: Principles and Practice of Cost Sharing — D-RED Seminar Slides
content: PDF slide deck from the 2024-12-11 Monthly D-RED Seminar 'Principles and Practice of Cost Sharing'. Presented by Dr. Farin Kamangar (MD, PhD, CRA), Ryan Mobley (CRA, CFRA), and Lena Fernandez. Covers cost share types (mandatory, voluntary committed, voluntary uncommitted), approval processes, and documentation requirements at MSU. An earlier version of the topic was presented 2021-12-08 ('Cost Sharing (Matching) at MSU', Farin Kamangar — PDF: ORA9 Cost Sharing.pdf).
